untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit chart pattern identification (Table 6.1 reference) and throwback/pullback detection which cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators. Pattern recognition logic, specific success rates, and target price computation are marked AUTHOR_SILENT and cannot be quantified. The signal is qualitative pattern-based rather than quantitative indicator-based.
translation_notes: Translated trend-following component using ADX_14 regime detection and SMA_50 crossover as a proxy for directional bias alignment. Stop-loss set conservatively at 2.5% to account for normal fluctuations as per source text. Entry conditions reflect bull/bear market context dependency. Chart pattern identification itself remains outside the scope of available indicators and requires manual pattern detection.
